---
title: Getting Started with Positron
subtitle: A Next-Generation IDE for data science
author: Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel <br> [bit.ly/positron-sdss](https://bit.ly/positron-sdss)
listing:
  id: modules
  contents: modules/*.qmd
  type: grid
  sort: filename
---

## Modules

::: {#modules}
:::

## Instructor

[Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel](https://mine-cr.com/) is a Professor of the Practice in the Department of Statistical Science at Duke University and a Senior Developer Advocate at Posit PBC.

## Acknowledgments

This workshop is based on the [Positron Workshop](https://posit-dev.github.io/positron-workshop/) created by Jenny Bryan, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Julia Silge, Charlotte Wickham, and Hadley Wickham.

## License

This work is licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
